title: XoperrCore
description: This is a library for my plugin you would need while configuring my BlissSMP remake (BlissGems)
body:
# XoperrCore API

Core API library for BlissGems and other XoperrDev plugins. Provides four main APIs:

1. **Gem Protection API** - Prevent items from being dropped or moved
2. **Custom Particle API** - Create custom particles using Display entities
3. **Inventory Text API** - Display custom text when items are held
4. **Auto-Enchant API** - Automatically apply enchantments to gear when gems are in inventory
---
